title: The National Commission for Women Act, 1990
full_text: The National Commission for Women Act, 1990 राष्‍ट्रीय महिला आयोग अधिनियम, 1990 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1990-20 Act Number: 20 Enactment Date: 1990-08-30 Act Year: 1990 Short Title: The National Commission for Women Act, 1990 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय महिला आयोग अधिनियम, 1990 Long Title: An Act to constitute a National Commission for Women and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development Enforcement Date: 31-01-1992 Notification: 31st January, 1992, vide notification No. S.O. 99(E), dated 31st January, 1992, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Commission for Women Act, 1990 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE NATIONAL COMMISSION FOR WOMEN CHAPTER III FUNCTIONS OF THE COMMISSION CHAPTER IV FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER V MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Constitution of the National Commission for Women. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Term of office and conditions of service of Chairperson and Members. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Officers and other employees of the Commission. Section 6. Salaries and allowances to be paid out of grants. Section 7. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate proceedings of the Commission. Section 8. Committees of the Commission. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Procedure to be regulated by the Commission. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Functions of the Commission. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Grants by the Central Government. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Accounts and audit. Section 13. Annual report. Section 14. Annual report and audit report to be laid before Parliament. Section 15. Chairperson, Members and Staff of the Commission to be public servants. Section 16. Central Government to consult Commission. Section 17. Power to make rules.
